lore.english:
Taimanin, student of Gosha Academy. The successor of the Itto Style, a swordsmanship style that has been passed down in the ninja village for generations. Famous for her nick-name "Savage Hunter", she is respected as a strong, elegant, and strict senior student in Gosha Academy. She is so popular among girls, a fan club of her is secretly growing in size without her even knowing it exists.

A childhood friend of "Lightning Taimanin", Mizuki Yukikaze, as well as her sister figure. She is almost always seen with Yukikaze and supports her faithfully. Aside from her, her known connection is her younger brother Akiyama Tatsuro and her junior Fuuma Kotaro.

User of [FFFF00FF]Void Art[-], a supernatural ninja art. On the basis that she can manipulate space, she can perceive things from a great distance by shifting her senses, or shift herself and others around her into a distant location. Void Art is highly versatile, but teleporting in rapid succession has the risk of exhausting her.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Itto Style: Kaede-no-Kata[-]
skills.description:
Uses Void Art to appear above the enemy and attack.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKSPD]
skills.description_readable: Uses Void Art to appear above the enemy and attack.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Itto Style: Kogarasi-no-Kata[-]
skills.description:
Uses Void Art to mercilessly slash the enemy, attacking 4 times.
Each hit inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:110203]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate].
If the character has [&SpdUp], performs 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack].
When an [&Common_Word_Skill_AddAttack] is triggered, inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:110204]%)[-] [&Weaken] to the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:110204]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:110204] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Uses Void Art to mercilessly slash the enemy, attacking 4 times.
Each hit inflicts ([V3:110203]%) [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate].

[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:110204] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Meteor Shower[-]
skills.description:
Summons a meteorite to attack [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
If the target has [&SpdDown], increases the efficacy of [&SpdDown] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:110302]%[-].
When defeating an enemy, gains [&Common_Word_Skill_AddTurn] and additionally gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:110304]%)[-] [&SpdUp].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:110304] turn(s)
